title: Ashen Autumn Forest
description: Adds golden Birch leaves and Lupine flowers to certain biomes.
body:
![Banner](https://i.imgur.com/zqqQgE2.png)
___
![About](https://i.imgur.com/nMG1TNv.png)

Want to play Ashen with a more colorful tone? Think Birch Leaves always being green gets boring? This pack adds golden leaves to Birch trees and saplings in Birch Forests, Taigas, and Old Growth Taigas, and adds Lupine flowers to cold biomes and Meadows (replacing Poppy and Allium textures, respectively).

This add-on **requires** Optifine or Continuity _and_ Polytone, or another equivalent in order to function!

Place this pack *above* Ashen in your load order.
___

This pack is designed and intended for use with [Ashen 16x](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ashen).
___

[![Bisect Banner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/3c357293-8dfb-410a-a5e3-0d778833e154.webp)](https://bisecthosting.com/aim-boot)
